description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring large windows and an open floor plan. The front yard includes a paved driveway and a well-maintained lawn with mature trees, while the backyard is enclosed with a small fence and additional green space. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of white and dark gray, giving the house a contemporary appearance. The interior is visible through the open facade, showing a spacious living area, kitchen, and multiple rooms. The house is constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with some wooden elements likely present in the interior. The overall structure is compact yet open, designed for comfortable urban living with direct access to outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of white and dark gray exterior, surrounded by a lawn and mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open living area, large windows, and a glimpse of the interior layout with trees in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard, fenced green space, and the rear facade with additional windows and patio access.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the driveway, main lawn, and mature trees, with the back of the house and its windows visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the side yard, tree coverage, and the solid wall with minimal window openings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on the front and side facades
